rationale: To optimize the Hierarchical Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model for coding tasks, I propose increasing the embedding dimension and expert hidden dimension to capture more nuanced representations of code. Additionally, increasing the number of groups and experts per group can help the model specialize in different aspects of coding tasks. The learning rate is decreased to prevent overshooting, and the number of heads is increased to enhance the model's ability to capture complex relationships in code. The number of layers is also increased to allow for more abstract representations of code.
